# Airborne HRS

Welcome to the Airborne HRS platform. Airborne HRS provides a Next-Gen HRMS platform with intelligent automation & services.

## Important Links

- [Home](https://airbornehrs.in/)
- [Job Portal](https://jobs.airbornehrs.in/jobs)
- [For Employers](https://jobs.airbornehrs.in/for-employers)
- [For Candidates](https://jobs.airbornehrs.in/for-candidates)
- [For Universities](https://jobs.airbornehrs.in/for-universities)
- [Blog](https://airbornehrs.in/blog)
